_about: The project adapter manifest — the one app-specific file, at the repo root so SDLC/ ports unedited. Read only through SDLC/lib/manifest.py. See SDLC/docs/reuse.md §2.
_scan_paths_note: Additive extra dirs for the semgrep floor, on top of shipped_paths. See SDLC/docs/reuse.md §2.
_docs_note: No ui_paths/user_facing_paths by design — the visual:/docs: gate anchors on the spec declaration, not diff paths. See SDLC/docs/reuse.md §2.
